_README: Manifest of cron-eligible Lariat jobs. Cron is the scheduler (system-level crontab); scripts/run-job.mjs is the wrapper cron calls. Each entry: command (argv array), cron (POSIX 5-field; informational here — actual cron registration lives in the operator's crontab), timeout_sec (lock stale-after window; the wrapper does NOT enforce this as a hard kill yet), description.

ingest-costing.description: Daily costing ingest from XL workbook (vendor_prices, recipe_costs, bom_lines, ingredient_maps, order_guide_items).

ingest-analytics.description: Daily Toast analytics ingest. Auto-runs sales depletion at the end.

ingest-toast.description: Toast weekly sales + labor timeseries pull (manual-drop folder + scheduled orchestrator).

ingest-shows.description: Prism / DICE event ingest into shows + showStatus.

sync-normalized.description: Sync recipes/normalized/*.csv into entities_recipes + bom_lines (full-refresh per recipe).

rebuild-cache.description: Refresh data/cache/*.json from source CSVs. Cheap, runs every 30 min.
